---
title: " English Church History, Adapted for Use in Day and Sunday Schools and for General Family Reading.   By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

##  English Church History, Adapted for Use in Day and Sunday Schools and for General Family Reading.   By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1883
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London. National Society’s Depository,  Sanctuary, Westminster.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
